visual_style.aesthetic: Dark cosmic, deep space, film grain 10-14%, red accent, cinematic
visual_style.thumbnail_style: Dark space background, red accented title, planetary or nebula imagery
visual_style.intro: Red particle logo reveal with space ambient sound
visual_style.outro: Subscribe prompt with red pulsing button

content_strategy.script_structure: hook → cosmic context → scientific fact → mind-expanding implication → CTA
content_strategy.hook_style: An impossible-sounding fact about space that is completely true

music_style: Ambient space, cinematic orchestral, dark electronic
